title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS video argues that coding alone is no longer sufficient differentiation for junior cloud engineers. Instead, juniors should focus on understanding fundamentals (security, reliability, cost, performance, maintainability) and use AI agents effectively while critically reviewing their output.
